title: Fictional Release Posters
description: Four independent fictional poster studies covering space drama, animated adventure, noir thriller, and family science-fantasy releases.
creative_direction: Each poster is a self-contained fake IP campaign artifact with readable title, cast, date, and fictional studio system, stressing production-grade typography and release hierarchy without reference dependencies.

en.title: Fictional Release Posters
en.description: Four independent fictional poster studies covering space drama, animated adventure, noir thriller, and family science-fantasy releases.

zh-CN.title: 架空发布海报单图
zh-CN.description: 四张独立架空发布海报，覆盖太空剧情、动画冒险、黑色惊悚和家庭科幻奇想。
